data.title: Assembly Biosciences presents data on recurrent genital herpes program, showcasing Phase 1a clinical data on ABI-5366 & ABI-1179 at STI & HIV 2025 World Congress and International Herpesvirus Workshop.
data.description: Recent data from Phase 1a clinical trials for two potential long-acting herpes simplex virus helicase-primase inhibitors, ABI-5366 and ABI-1179, were disclosed. The trials involved healthy participants and showed promising results for both candidates. The presentation highlighted the safety and efficacy of these novel inhibitors in short-term testing.

data.title: PONY AI Inc. gets permit for fully driverless Robotaxi service in Shanghai's Pudong New Area, showcasing growing regulatory trust and advancing commercialization. (wc: 144)
data.description: On July 26, 2025, Pony AI Inc. revealed that it obtained a permit to offer fully driverless commercial Robotaxi services in Shanghai’s Pudong New Area. This permit was granted at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (“WAIC”) 2025. Pony.ai, a prominent player in autonomous mobility, operates under the Nasdaq symbol PONY. The milestone signifies growing regulatory confidence in the Company’s technology and safety protocols. It marks a significant advancement in the commercialization of Robotaxis in a premier urban market in China, reflecting the Company’s commitment to innovation and excellence in the autonomous vehicle industry.

data.title: Ethereum's popularity spike on social media raises concerns for a possible price drop, says Santiment.
data.description: Santiment warns of a possible price correction for Ether due to its significant increase in social media popularity. This surge in social media dominance raises concerns about the cryptocurrency's stability. Investors should be cautious as Ether's value has reached high levels, leading to speculation about a potential downturn.

data.title: High level of social chatter about Ether could indicate a looming price correction, warns Santiment.
data.description: According to data from Santiment, there has been a significant increase in Ether's social dominance, indicating a possible risk of a price correction. This surge in social dominance suggests that the price of Ether may be vulnerable to a downturn. Investors should be cautious as the current trend could lead to a potential correction in the price of Ether.

data.title: Dogwifhat (WIF) gains 6.14% to $1.07 after testing $1.20 support, signaling potential breakout above resistance.
data.description: After dropping to $1.20 and retesting key support, WIF has seen a recovery in price to $1.07, marking a 6.14% increase. This surge displays bullish momentum, with technical indicators hinting at a potential breakout above resistance levels.

data.title: PEPE gains 5% with $1B open interest and 300% surge in Google searches, hinting at revived meme coin interest.
data.description: PEPE cryptocurrency is experiencing a daily increase of 5%, leading to record-breaking $1 billion open interest and a significant surge of 300% in Google searches. This trend indicates a resurgence in momentum for the meme coin.

data.title: ALGO price jumps 5.39% to surpass $0.27 on strong bullish momentum, displaying positive signs for potential growth ahead.
data.description: The price of ALGO has experienced a significant surge of 5.39%, reaching $0.27, fueled by robust bullish signals. Technical indicators are pointing towards the likelihood of further increases in value, even though momentum readings exhibit a mix of signals.

data.title: INJ price climbs to $14.18 (+6.38% daily), rising from last week's 14% surge. Bulls eye $15.71 resistance level.
data.description: The stock ticker symbol INJ is currently trading at $14.18, reflecting a daily increase of 6.38%. This positive trend in price follows a significant surge of 14% last week. Market analysts observe a continued technical breakout momentum in the stock, with bullish investors aiming for the $15.71 resistance level. This upward movement suggests growing confidence in the stock's performance.

data.title: CRV hits $1.06, up 79% weekly. Curve breaches resistance, technicals suggest further gains in overbought market.
data.description: The price of CRV has seen a significant increase to $1.06, showing a 79% gain over the week. Curve has surpassed crucial resistance levels, prompting technical indicators to suggest a possible continuation of this trend, despite the current overbought status.

data.title: FLOKI spikes 8.15%, showing bullish momentum. Key resistance levels will guide traders in next moves.
data.description: FLOKI surged by 8.15% over the past 24 hours, accompanied by noticeable bullish indicators. An analysis of the technical aspects indicates the existence of crucial resistance levels that might play a significant role in guiding the future actions of traders.

data.title: TONcoin (TON) rises 7% to $3.31, showing bullish momentum with MACD crossover, eyes $3.59 resistance amid strong volume.
data.description: The price of TON has surged to $3.31 amid high trading volume and a bullish MACD crossover. It is now nearing a crucial resistance level at $3.59 as momentum indicators continue to improve.

data.title: SHIB price surges by 6.34% despite mixed technical signals. RSI at 55.45 indicates neutral ground for potential upward trend.
data.description: Shiba Inu is seeing bullish trading activity even as bearish MACD signals are present. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for SHIB stands at 55.45, indicating a neutral position and potential for additional upward movement.

data.title: Worldcoin (WLD) price jumps 5.64% to $1.16 amid partnerships with Razer and Match Group; regulatory issues present challenges.
data.description: The price of WLD has seen a significant increase, reaching $1.16, fueled by key collaborations with Razer and Match Group. However, the enthusiasm among traders is dampened by regulatory scrutiny in Germany, leading to mixed sentiments in the market.

data.title: SUI's price spikes 10% to $3.98 as SEC assesses Spot ETF proposal from Canary Capital, aiming for $7 mark.
data.description: The stock SUI is currently trading at $3.98, marking a 10.09% increase for the day after the Securities and Exchange Commission's examination of Canary Capital's spot ETF plan. A technical breakout supports the growing optimism, suggesting a bullish trend aiming for a target of $7.

data.title: OP price surges by 7.86% to $0.73, ignoring bearish pressure. Recovery looks promising amid technical weakness & token unlock worries.
data.description: The value of OP is currently trading at $0.73, representing an increase of 7.86% in daily gains. This uptick signifies a potential recovery, although concerns regarding technical weaknesses and an upcoming token unlock have led to some apprehension among traders.

data.title: Arbitrum (ARB) gains 7.16%, hits $0.45 amid PayPal integration, despite unease over looming 92.65M token release in 2025.
data.description: The price of ARB has risen to $0.45, experiencing a daily gain of 7.16%. This surge comes as news about PayPal adoption offsets worries surrounding the forthcoming unlock of 92.65 million tokens scheduled for August 16, 2025.

data.title: APT price jumps 5.11% to $4.77, testing key $4.77 support level. RSI signals neutral, resistance at $5.66, and strong $4.36 support.
data.description: The price of APT has experienced a significant increase of 5.11%, reaching $4.77, in the midst of neutral RSI signals. A key resistance level is currently at $5.66, while a strong support level remains steady at $4.36, indicating the possibility of a potential breakout in the near future.

data.title: NEAR Protocol jumps 7.5% to $2.87. RSI neutral, Everclear partnership boosts institutional interest amid volatility.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently trading at $2.87, showing a 7.5% increase in daily gains. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) has moved into the neutral zone. A recent partnership with Everclear has sparked institutional interest in the project. These developments come during a volatile week for the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces Llama Nemotron Super v1.5 for better AI efficiency in reasoning & agentic tasks, promising improved accuracy.
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled the latest version of their powerful AI system, the Llama Nemotron Super v1.5. This new model boasts enhanced precision and effectiveness in AI operations, especially in tasks involving reasoning and agency. The update is set to make a significant impact on the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: XLM surges to $0.44, up 100% in July. Despite a slight 4.27% daily pullback, bullish momentum remains strong.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XLM is currently being traded at $0.44, which reflects a 4.27% increase in its daily value. Throughout July, XLM experienced significant gains ranging between 75% to 120%. Despite recent consolidation, technical analysis indicates a bullish trend, suggesting further growth potential for XLM.
